report.summary: Cycle-close v12: 5/6 API routes verified healthy in production (market-metrics still 404). +4 published slugs since v11 (498 total). Deploy drift now 7 days with 769 uncommitted items. Vercel stable — latest redeploy 2h ago, all builds Ready.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGE AUDIT: 498 published slugs in local PUBLISHED_PAGES (+4 from v11). 103 still missing backing page.tsx files — unchanged gap across /learn, /wallets, /investing/best, /taxes, /blog sections.

TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files (structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx, crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx) — unchanged from v11, non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors.
HOMEPAGE VERIFIED: degen0x.com returns 200 with correct H1 ('Onboard the Next 1 Billion Users to Web3').
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: Zero commits since v11. No code changes to introduce regressions.

PUBLISH QUEUE DELTA: 2 items drained since v11 (solana-developer-platform-sdp-guide, agentic-payments-protocols-guide-2026 promoted). 2 new items remain (raas-rollup-as-a-service, staking-as-a-service-providers).

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: LIVE VERIFIED — /api/health: healthy, CoinGecko responseTime 65ms, cache 45ms, analytics 47ms. Rate limit 1499/1500 remaining.
LIVE VERIFIED — /api/prices: Returning live data. BTC $69,382 (-2.18% 24h), ETH included. Sparkline data present.
LIVE VERIFIED — /api/fear-greed: Value 11 (Extreme Fear), full 30-day history present. Data fresh as of 2026-03-24.
LIVE VERIFIED — /api/trending: Returning CoinGecko trending coins (Bittensor, Backpack, etc.). Data fresh.
LIVE VERIFIED — /api/market-dominance: BTC dominance 56.36%, ETH 10.35%, total market cap $2.46T. Data fresh.
LIVE 404 — /api/market-metrics: Returns 404 page in production. Route exists locally but is uncommitted. P1 carry-over.
LIVE VERIFIED — /api/defi-yields: Returning DefiLlama yield data successfully. Fresh pool data with APY values.
CACHE TTLs: All properly configured — prices 60s, trending 300s, fear-greed 600s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields configurable.
RATE LIMITING: Still missing on 6 core data routes — P1 carry-over from v11.

sections.title: DevOps
items: VERCEL STATUS: All deployments showing 'Ready'. Current production deploy is 2h old (redeploy of prior build). Build time ~4m 19s.
LAST CODE DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 7 days ago. All subsequent deploys are redeploys of same code snapshot.
REDEPLOY CHAIN: 8+ redeploys since Mar 17 code push — automated hourly cycle redeploys keeping edge cache fresh.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 769 items (+7 from v11, all new report files). Critical uncommitted: middleware.ts, published-pages.ts, 20+ new page routes, /api/market-metrics.
DEPLOY DRIFT [P0]: 7-day drift remains the #1 blocker. 160+ pages promoted locally since Mar 17 are invisible to users and Google.
NO ERROR SPIKES: Site serving cleanly from Mar 17 snapshot. All verified routes responding with fresh data.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DELTA THIS CYCLE (v12 vs v11): +4 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (498 total). Publish queue rotated: 2 items drained (solana-developer-platform, agentic-payments), 2 new items added (raas-rollup, staking-as-a-service).
PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 items remaining — /learn/raas-rollup-as-a-service-guide-2026, /learn/staking-as-a-service-providers-guide-2026.
PRODUCTION GAP: Local has 498 published slugs. Production running ~338 from Mar 17 deploy. Gap of ~160 pages.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit all 769 uncommitted items and deploy to Vercel. 7 days of drift is the #1 blocker — every hour costs indexing opportunity.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: /api/market-metrics 404 fix — include in next commit.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 46 TS errors in 3 files before they compound.
ACTION REQUIRED [P2]: Drain final 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items.
CARRY-OVER: Rate-limit 6 core API routes, build /trading hub page, build /compare/exchanges hub, add missing page.tsx for 103 published slugs.
